title: EVM is coming to Cryptool: ETH and BNB Chain integrations announced
content_html:
EVM support is coming to Cryptool next week. Both Ethereum and BNB Chain integrations are going live, opening the platform up to a much wider set of investors, projects and fundraising pools.

Alongside the EVM launch, a major player in the space is onboarding to run large OTC fundraises directly on the platform. If you want early access to those deals, reach out to the team for an introduction.

This is the start of a much broader Cryptool footprint across the main EVM ecosystems.
author: Cryptool
